title: TerraFabric
description: This modpack combines electricity, mechanical contraptions and amazing world generation.
body: Welcome to TerraFabric, a modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1 that combines immersive world-building, exploration, and quality-of-life improvements to elevate your survival experience. With a carefully curated selection of mods, TerraFabric offers a seamless blend of performance optimization, realistic visuals, and engaging gameplay enhancements.
